testcase.name: Accessibility › Begin verification button is keyboard-focusable
Accessibility › card has visible text contrast (dark background + light text)
Starting a session › fetches challenges and shows preview after clicking Begin
Starting a session › shows GET READY overlay during prepare stage
Starting a session › shows error banner when server is unreachable
Starting a session › shows error banner on camera denial
Challenge recording › shows REC indicator while recording
Challenge recording › displays first challenge icon and label
Challenge recording › switches to second challenge after half duration
Challenge recording › shows Analysing spinner after recording stops
Success stage › shows Liveness confirmed message
Success stage › shows ✓ for each passed challenge

failure.message: liveness-check.spec.ts:278:3 shows ✓ for each passed challenge

testcase.failure:
liveness-check.spec.ts:278:3 › Success stage › shows ✓ for each passed challenge ─────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
Locator: locator('text=✓') Expected: 3 Received: 4 Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=✓') 9 × locator resolved to 4 elements - unexpected value "4"
279 | await reachSuccess(page, ["blink_twice", "smile"]); 280 | const checks = page.locator("text=✓"); > 281 | await expect(checks).toHaveCount(3); // header + 2 challenges | ^ 282 | }); 283 | 284 | test("shows disabled Verified button", async ({ page }) => { at C:\Users\MW50001056\Downloads\Transformation\testing\playwright-demo\tests\liveness-check.spec.ts:281:26
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\liveness-check-Success-sta-458bb-✓-for-each-passed-challenge\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\test-results\liveness-check-Success-sta-458bb-✓-for-each-passed-challenge\error-context.md

testcase.name: Success stage › shows disabled Verified button
Success stage › does NOT show Try again button on success
Failure stage › shows Verification failed message
Failure stage › shows failure detail strings for each challenge
Failure stage › shows Try again button
Failure stage › shows attempts counter after first failure
Failure stage › resets to idle when Try again is clicked
Retry flow › issues new challenges on retry
Retry flow › increments attempt counter across retries
Server error handling › shows error on 500 from verify endpoint

failure.message: liveness-check.spec.ts:418:3 shows error on 500 from verify endpoint

testcase.failure:
liveness-check.spec.ts:418:3 › Server error handling › shows error on 500 from verify endpoint ─── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('Verification failed') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('Verification failed') resolved to 2 elements: 1)

testcase.name: Server error handling › shows error field from JSON error response
Idle stage › renders title and subtitle
Idle stage › shows Begin verification button
Idle stage › shows face-outline SVG placeholder
Idle stage › does NOT show challenge preview before session is loaded

failure.message: presence.spec.ts:28:3 does NOT show challenge preview before session is loaded

testcase.failure:
presence.spec.ts:28:3 › Idle stage › does NOT show challenge preview before session is loaded ──── Error: expect(locator).not.toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('You will be asked to:') Expected: not visible Received: visible Timeout: 5000ms Call log: - Expect "not toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText('You will be asked to:') 8 × locator resolved to
You will be asked to:
